## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover behavior or lifecycle changes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` is updated for notable changes
- [ ] I have the right to submit this contribution under AGPL-3.0-only
- [ ] No credentials, stream keys, certificates, or generated artifacts added
- [ ] Live sample-buffer paths avoid new allocations and main-thread hops
